question: Does the company encourage downstream partners to carry out climate-related risk assessments?
sources:
Strategic approach 
Through our Ambition Zero Carbon strategy, we are pursuing ambitious science-based decarbonisation targets, accelerating our progress towards net zero, and managing the risks and opportunities presented by climate change: 
[...]
• We recognise the importance of our supply chain and suppliers, whom we engage with, educate, support and incentivise to act [...]
We are working to build transparent supply chains by asking our partners to assess and disclose their GHG emissions to the CDP Supply Chain Programme, with 708 suppliers (59% of in-scope spend).
